reviews.review_description:
Needs a few things. Add a frame. A thin TV bezel. It'll get rid of the jaggy edges, give you something else to bounce light off, and make for a more integrated experience. Hell, offer several frames.

Secondly, manual controls, please. You've got two joysticks, use them. Having the angle based on viewpoint is a pain and leads to much sitting, standing, crouching. Just let me sit, and control. 

Other than that, surprisingly effective way to consume media. 3D would be terrific, but that's more down to the lack of vendors. Take my money, Prime, Disney! 

Happy to support this one.

EDIT: having lived with it a while, it's not really working. If you pause and take off the headset, everything resets, which is tiresome. Sometimes the headset forgot which room it was in mid movie. Plus, the Quest 3 with a good headstrap is a mighty piece of kit to have on your face for a whole movie, with no interrupts unless you want to reset the screen again. A glimpse into the future for sure, but tech and software will have to get a lot better, and I mean a lot better, before this is my daily driver audio visually.

I really enjoy using this software; it’s well made and works great. It would look even better with a blurred edge around the video. The only issue is that the settings don’t stay saved, so I have to reset them every time. Still, I think it’s a great product and I appreciate the work that went into it.

Truly, one of the worst apps I’ve bought for the Meta3. It does absolutely nothing that the free apps do and the ads for a very misleading. It’s basically just a web browser and each time you want to go to a streaming service you have to type it in. It is very user unfriendly I am amazed it has so many people liking it . I want my money back!
The app cannot verify the apple account .. it was the primary reason for purchase .. the resolution does not seem to be that great on Disney +

I wanted to play .mkv files from my local space but app doesn’t let me select those files.  Files were greyed out and also there is some lag when we fullscreen the video on YouTube.  Hope this gets fixed real soon.

When scrolling down the interface, a solid color block (black or white) appears first. Once this block fills about 2/3 of the screen, the actual finally starts to roll within the remaining 1/3 section.

Restarting the Quest and reinstalling the app did not fix it. This problem has persisted for about 2-3 weeks since the system update, and it still hasn't been resolved.

The issue mentioned above has been resolved, and I truly appreciate the effort put in by the support team. If you're reading this and still hesitating about whether to make the purchase, I highly recommend going for it. Not only does this software support 4K playback (the built-in browser only offers 1080p), but the team also genuinely takes the time to address user concerns.

developer_response.body:
Hi~@kimi.651385,
We apologize for the inconvenience. We have identified that this issue is related to the Meta Quest system software—for example, it occurs on version v85 but does not occur on v83. We are actively working on a fix, and we appreciate your patience!

edit:
Hi~
We have coordinated with Meta's technical team and confirmed that a system-level bug caused the flickering and white screen issues.

To resolve this, please update your Meta Quest system to version v2.1.

Thank you for your patience!

reviews.review_description: May I know if there is any way to adjust the screen ratio when playing local SBS content? The screen is extremely wide and strange and would appreciate if we can manually adjust the ratio (eg preset ratio).

Gesture control is hard to use. It would be great if it could be used as easily as in the main control room.
Will there be curved screens in the future, no longer as flat as they are now?
Can the black lines representing the structure that appear when the video image extends beyond the scanned room structure be removed?

developer_response.body:
Hi SLKEIO,

Thank you very much for your detailed feedback.

We have been working hard to investigate and locate the root cause of the issues you described—including the flickering comment section in full-screen mode, the white screens during scrolling, and the flashing subtitles.

After closely collaborating with Meta’s technical support team, we discovered that these are actually caused by a system-level framework bug within the Meta Quest OS, rather than our application itself.

The good news is that Meta has officially released a fix. You can resolve these issues by updating your Meta Quest system to version v2.1

Please feel free to let me know if it works for you.

reviews.review_description:
This application is a mediocre quick grab. Soon as you pay for the application, you’ll see that it does nothing magnificent outside of where all the other free applications do and just to get these different special shadows around your screen, you have to pay extra money. So basically this app is worthless. 

I think Meta should be ashamed for allowing these mediocre soft handed developers on this platform to suck money away from people who actually work hard.

developer_response.body:
Hi~ @ahumaann,
Thank you so much for your feedback! We’re sorry about not meeting your expectations.

Spatial TV offers many features worth exploring. When you hover your mouse over the right side of the screen, you can set special visual effects there, such as environment lighting or screen glow. The environment lighting in particular is really worth exploring and trying out — it can significantly enhance the viewing experience.

If you have further questions or feedback, please join our Discord page at https://discord.gg/MynsTjZ6Bp.

reviews.review_description:
My most used app on here was Big Screen, until I found this, if you have a big enough room you can have a movie theater size screen on your wall that actually looks like it’s there, the spatial effects are such a game changer for watching on VR but I do hope they add a sbs 3D option, bummed me out when I couldn’t find a setting for it to watch 3D movies, besides that it’s my favorite app on here 👍👍 

Update: SBS Mode!!!

developer_response.body:
Hi~@GHoSTKNiFE7o2,

Thank you so much for enjoying Spatial TV!
In the latest version, we've also added support for local video file playback, and it's compatible with glowing effects and environment lighting.
Give it a try! Your feedback is crucial to us!

Welcome to join our Discord group and stay tuned:https://discord.gg/MynsTjZ6Bp.

reviews.review_description: Love the app. Room for small improvements, but overall a well polished entertainment app.  Netflix support would be great, but I'm sure your tired of hearing that. Also the option to resize you screen, not the illusion of resizing your screen by bringing it closer to you face. Great app. Thank you for making it. Keep up the great work.

developer_response.body:
Hi~ @ShotgunShayne,
Thank you so much for your feedback! We're glad to hear you're enjoying Spatial TV!
If you have further questions or feedback, please join our Discord page at https://discord.gg/MynsTjZ6Bp.

reviews.review_description: I encountered a bug: when I scroll up, the entire webpage scrolls instead of scrolling within the page. Additionally, when a video is in fullscreen mode, the progress bar and other elements flicker constantly.

developer_response.body:
Hi~@ElectricLeopard566,
We sincerely apologize for the inconvenience. We have indeed noticed that this issue occurs on some devices with different versions. You can try restarting your device to temporarily resolve the problem, and we are actively working to fix it. Please stay tuned for updates.

edit:
Hi~
We have coordinated with Meta's technical team and confirmed that a system-level bug caused the flickering and white screen issues.

To resolve this, please update your Meta Quest system to version v2.1.

Thank you for your patience!

reviews.review_description:
I’ve been using this app for a bit now, and honestly, it turned out better than I expected. After actually trying it myself, my experience has been very different.

The visual effects — especially the environment lighting and screen glowing(one default effect that’s free, and the other styles require an additional purchase) — are genuinely well done and add a nice sense of immersion when watching videos. It’s not just a gimmick. The overall UI feels clean and the app runs smoothly without crashes or weird hiccups.

There’s still room for improvement (more streaming service support, more customization options, etc.), but as it is right now, it’s already one of the more polished and comfortable VR video apps I’ve used.

Everyone’s needs are different, but for me, this app definitely improved my viewing experience in VR. And it’s clear the developers are actively updating and listening to feedback.

After trying the app myself, The environment lighting and glow effects add real immersion, especially when watching movies or playing web-based games.🔥🔥🔥🔥🔥🔥

The app runs smoothly with a clean, stable UI. While Netflix support and a few more customization options would make it even better😂, the current experience is already strong.
Only thing is some times it doesn't work it kicks me off

I have just downloaded this app. I have to say that for viewing experience, it’s one of the more ‘pleasant’ ways to watch movies :) Lovely lighting effects. I’ve never liked the apps that place you in massive 3D cinemas. I’m much prefer to have a smaller screen, floating in the air in the living room. This fits the bill perfectly :) Well done. 

There are a couple of areas that could do with improvement. When scrolling in the bowser, when you get to the bottom, you get a ‘white bit’ that comes halfway up the screen.  It goes away after scrolling the other way, but it just needs a bit of ‘polishing’

Also, how do you get rid of shortcuts in the favourites menu (left hand side). I seem to have two chrome shortcuts. I only want the one. There are no instructions.

UPDATE: After a system re-boot, everything is working perfectly. Great app 👍

developer_response.body:
Hi~@fearsome.fensom,
Thank you so much for your feedback! If you want to unfavorite a website from the left side of the page, you can click on the website, then hover your cursor over the star icon on the right side of the top bar, and click it to unfavorite it.
I hope this helps:)

For the ‘white bit’, would it be possible to share a screenshot with us on our Discord? That would be very helpful for us to better understand and investigate the issue.
https://discord.gg/MynsTjZ6Bp.
Thanks again for your support!

reviews.review_description:
The app runs smoothly on my device, and the interface feels polished.  
There is one thing I hope to see in future updates:
I think could be improved is the onboarding for new users. Some of the best visual effects are a bit easy to miss if you don’t have the patience to explore the menus, so a clearer or more guided introduction would help new users discover those features right away.
But overall it’s already very solid. I’m really enjoying it.

This app was already great when first purchased but in the discord group we were asking for new features & the team actually made it happen. They will keep making it better over time & will become the most immersive video player on the market !

developer_response.body:
Hi~@pxstudio,
Thank you for the recognition! It means a lot to us.
User feedback is essential to everything we do — you’re the reason Spatial TV keeps getting better.❤️

reviews.review_description: The update is excellent. Local file viewing is fantastic. But I have a very important request: not everyone finds local file viewing convenient. Please add the ability to view files via DLNA and SMB in a future update. If you implement this, your app will become number one.

developer_response.body:
Hi~@VR_scan,
Thank you so much for enjoying Spatial TV and for the detailed feedback!

The good news is that SMB support is already under development!

You’re very welcome to join our Discord community, where we regularly share development progress and upcoming features. We’d also love to hear more of your feedback and use cases there — it truly helps us shape the app.

https://discord.gg/MynsTjZ6Bp.

reviews.review_description: It's fun to watch films and series because they feel very real. However, when I watch a film, I see a black stripe on my wall below, which unfortunately bothers me and doesn't look nice. Everything else works perfectly and without errors, but Netflix could improve the app.

developer_response.body:
Hi~@Luces,
Thank you for the feedback!
About the black stripe you mentioned — would it be possible to share a screenshot with us on our Discord? That would be very helpful for us to better understand and investigate the issue.
https://discord.gg/MynsTjZ6Bp.
Thanks again for your support!

reviews.review_description:
Cant get out of mixed reality i want vr 
 reality ,please help

developer_response.body:
Hi~ @stephen.simmons31,
If I understand you correctly, you’d like to exit MR and switch to a fully immersive VR experience (with a black background), is that right?

In Spatial TV, you can do this by moving your cursor to the right side of the screen and adjusting the environment lighting slider. Lowering the lighting will gradually fade out the passthrough and put you into full immersive mode.

If this doesn’t solve the issue, or if you need any further assistance, please feel free to reach out — we’re happy to help!

reviews.review_description: What really stood out to me is how SBS mode combined with the glow lighting effect looks, Super immersive and just feels seriously cool.

There's nothing actually special about this app. I should have read other people's reviews before purchasing it. I thought it was in 3D. It's just an ordinary big TV.  Bigscreen is much better, and it's free.The clarity of this tv is no better than bigscreen. I feel it's a waste of $9.99.  I would not recommend it to anyone.  Big disappointment. 😕

reviews.review_description: I bought this specifically for Apple TV. Unfortunately, it will not accept my password, no matter how many times I try. Very disappointing to say the least.
Great but could do with netflix

developer_response.body: Indeed, we hope to support Netflix someday, but due to DRM restrictions, this is not possible at present.

reviews.review_title: It's not bad, but a long way to go
reviews.review_description:
I bought this after reading some positive reviews, but so far I find the experience lacking and certainly not as good over all as using apps natively.

The interface can be quite clunky, I found the keyboard wouldn't always reshow after being minimised, popular apps like Netflix and Nowtv just don't work, even in the web browser.

The app has promise, but for a paid app, it has a long way to go. That being said, it's early days, so I look forward to seeing how the developers improve it in future interactions.

developer_response.body:
Hi~ @Notroc:
Thank you so much for taking the time to share such detailed feedback. Your suggestions are extremely helpful for us to improve. 

We'll work on refining the interface, fixing these issues. We really appreciate your patience and support.

Welcome to join our Discord!
https://discord.gg/MynsTjZ6Bp.

reviews.review_description: Excellents effets de lumière, très bien !

developer_response.body:

reviews.review_title: It is a paid web browser
reviews.review_description:
It was advertised as having support for many streaming services in a way that sounded like it was native/unique in-app support. It’s not. It’s a web browser. And not that great. It’s just a limited shell of Chrome. It offered no benefits over than the Meta Browser. It doesn’t support Paramount+ (neither does Meta). And it doesn’t support local media. 

It’s a $10 web browser with limited functionality. With no free/testing version. No refunds. I used it twice. It even says internet connection not required. Would be very interested in hearing how that works.

reviews.review_title: Like it, but need a bug fixed asap!
reviews.review_description: I only added Amazon Prime to the left side widgets and now the add feature (+ sign) is gone and i cant add any of the remaining supported video sources! If i knew you only get one chance to add, i would have added them all! I need this fixed to justify the app purchase,

This will add it to the favorites bar on the left for easy access next time. If you have any further comments or suggestions, please feel free to join our Discord:https://discord.gg/MynsTjZ6Bp

reviews.review_description: The app is a good idea in theory. However it just doesn't work well. Too many services just don't work or are buggy and for those that do the quality is too low to want to use a huge screen.

reviews.review_title: Best Streaming experience on the quest
reviews.review_description: The TV quality is spectacular and their browser supports video players that aren't supported on the meta 3 browser such as slingtv. The only thing that could make it better if it was usable in other apps.

reviews.review_title: Good job team spatial TV. Make it better
reviews.review_description:
Who needs a Ray Neo, Xreal, Virture  XR glasses if one has meta quest 3 and Spatial TV app. I believe the max screen size is almost 200 inches with good clarity with high streaming quality and Wi-Fi speed. 

The $4 flowing special effects around screen is okay but is optional because the default one is also okay. The app admin should allow more than 60 secs to decide for a purchase. Like 3 sessions of 5 mins. If anyone is keeping the effect for 15 min they gonna buy it. Taking the decision to buy for a 60 sec one time demo is tough and so will be negative for many. So app admin and dev team, do keep this in mind for future updates.

The choices of streaming apps is too limited. One star less is for that reason only. App admin and dev team should understand that meta quest nowadays is used in many countries besides USA. BTW I am from India. So a android playstore type integration to download and enjoy any streaming service available in the country is extremely important for the good app to become a blockbuster app. And FYI app admin and dev team the browser provided don't support any streaming service. Whenever I tried I get the error message - Please visit chrome/settings/content/protected content and make sure " Sites can play protected content" is selected. But there is no setting available in the browser provided in the app to enable protected content. So Dev team either give customers the option to install any streaming app or update your browser to support any streaming service. App admin this is most important for your next upgrade and continuous earnings.

The streaming services desired by me are Netflix, Jiohotstar, Zee5, SonyLiv, MX player, Docubay, Jiocinema, TVFplay in order of preference. So please get us Netflix atleast ASAP.

This would have received 5 stars IF IT WOULD PLAY NETFLIX. Oh and Foxtel. Seriously, it's 2025 - why and how can this app not play Netflix????? It is the massive elephant in the room that makes this app not a serious contender and leaves you disappointed in the end.

developer_response.body:
Hi ~ @Ryan_F30,
Thank you for your feedback, and we completely understand your frustration. Unfortunately, due to DRM restrictions, services like Netflix cannot be supported in Spatial TV.
We know this is disappointing, and we truly appreciate your understanding as we continue to improve other features and functionality :)
If you have further questions or feedback, please join our Discord page at https://discord.gg/MynsTjZ6Bp.

reviews.review_description: The app description promoted more than what it actually offers. It’s simply a web browser. To date, the best shared viewing/streaming app is still Bigscreen.

If you have further questions or feedback, please join our Discord page at https://discord.gg/MynsTjZ6Bp.

reviews.review_description: Cannot play any local file movies, just use the browser. The glowing isn't working, as lights needs to be on in the room for tracking, you see your room all around the browser window... Cannot use Bluetooth headphones, there's a dirty noise interference. I really regret to have wasted 10 bucks on this useless badly made app. Can't even ask for refund, what a scam.

developer_response.body:
Hi~ @go.255186, thanks for your feedback. I'm very sorry to cause you inconvenience, we'll keep making Spatial TV better!
If you have further questions or feedback, please join our Discord page at https://discord.gg/MynsTjZ6Bp.

reviews.review_description:
It’s clear that the development team is doing all they can with the limitations of the platform. I can’t use it with my AirPods and it’s certainly not compatible with all services, but it’s really the best option currently available for streaming on major platforms, aside from Netflix. It would be cool if they incorporated custom￼ virtual environments as well. ￼￼ I think I would’ve paid even more for that, especially if one of the environments was actually a movie theater. 

Crazy being able to actually do the dishes and have a giant screen in front of me at the sink. ￼

This is app is probably one of the best ones for movie watching or for anything on a web browser. I mostly use this for movies and when I originally bought it I was very impressed with the quality this app brings. Most movie services look amazing, and if you have the new quest 3 they are basically 4k quality. This is for sure my number one app for watching any video and also for a web browser. 100 percent worth the money.

reviews.review_title: nice app but missing 3d Sbs feature
reviews.review_description: Hi this is a great app. Thanks for what you have created so far. It only needs one major feature to turn it to five stars. Can you please add a 3d half sbs and a 3d full sbs mode so it allows us to watch 3d videos we have on plex or the device

developer_response.body:
Hi~ @ill_static_beats, Thanks for your feedback!  We hope SBS will be supported in Spatial TV in the future, we'll look into this :)

If you have further questions or feedback, please join our Discord page at https://discord.gg/MynsTjZ6Bp.

reviews.review_description: Just purchased, pretty cool!

In theory nice. The reflections look good and the UI design is nice. It lacks some really basic features tho:
- no option to paste (I want to paste my passwords for login please)
- using its own keyboard for some reason?
- no pop up blocker. Pop ups overwrite the browser window
All of this unfortunately makes the app unusable for me. It looks nice on YouTube videos tho.

developer_response.body:
Hi~ @spidercookie, thanks for your feedback, could you please let us know which website requires the 'pop up', we'll look into this.

If you have further questions or feedback, please join our Discord page at https://discord.gg/MynsTjZ6Bp.

reviews.review_description: Do I like it for Plex and Discovery?  Yes.  But Netflix is by far and away the most dominant streaming service online across the globe.   It's the go-to before everything else.  Not supporting Netflix is an epic failure in my opinion and it's difficult to get past. You can't even play Netflix using the web browser.

developer_response.body:
Hi~ @Dave_Wave, thanks for your feedback. We hope to get Netflix supported too! For now, there's a DRM issue that prevents us from streaming it. We'll work on this issue and hopefully get it supported in the future. 
If you have further questions or feedback, please join our Discord page at https://discord.gg/MynsTjZ6Bp.

reviews.review_description:
I was really excited to support the developers of this app, but I was somewhat disappointed using it.

In-app purchases; to really get an ambient-light glow effect around the edges, you need to pay the same price as the app per different ambient-light modes. I was shocked this wasn't included. Also these extra payed modes don't even look that great and worth it either.

Some other reviewer said; "This is just a glorified browser." Well, yeah, I agree, though it is sort of more pleasant with the little extra lighting bouncing in the room that you will get with this.

Does it work? The lighting reflection in your room (what is the base purpose of this app) even after a good room scan, needs some work. In broad daylight or at night, it is somewhat glitchy and not yet perfect.

Improvements: more options, maybe TV borders around the screen, I hope the developers will work on local file playing including subtitles, and on an SBS 3D movie toggle option. Also there is no spatial audio, there could be a setting to enable this if preferred.

Hopefully, all of this without paywalls. Just increase your app's price, or make a donation button available. I'm sure people will support you. It has great potential!

developer_response.body:
Hi~ @Casper.NL
Thank you so much for your detailed feedback! We truly appreciate your insights.

Regarding lighting reflection stability, we are continuously refining our algorithm to minimize glitches in different lighting conditions.

Your suggestions are all valuable, and they mean a lot to us! And we will seriously consider them for future updates.

We are also exploring better ways to make the full experience accessible to more users. And we sincerely appreciate your thoughtful feedback! 

If you have further questions or feedback, please join our Discord page at https://discord.gg/MynsTjZ6Bp.

reviews.review_description: This is a really great app. I love that it lets me watch all my streaming services (except Netflix) in one place. The picture and visual effects make for an incredible experience. If I could curve the screen and spawn multiple screens (for NFL Sundays) then it would be perfect!

So, it's not using native apps for services but instead uses chrome browser.  And it cannot play 265 / HEVC encoded media from Plex Media Server, just audio and a black screen.   The native browser in Quest 3 plays it just fine.  Chrome on any other device also plays fine.  But not this dumbed down version of Chrome they have in this app.  

If you are buying to use with Plex Media Server and almost all your media is 265/HEVC, don't buy.  You'll be very disappointed.

The native browser on the device works fine, and has great  full screen mode and room dimming.  

I'm very disappointed but will keep the app.  Maybe they'll fix the app.

developer_response.body: Hi~ @ObiTroy, thanks for your feedback, I'm sorry to cause you inconvenience, and we'll do our best to improve Spatial TV! If you have further questions or need additional clarification, please don't hesitate to contact us on Discord:https://discord.gg/MynsTjZ6Bp

reviews.review_title: Good for what it can do
reviews.review_description: The app is very good and I like the lighting features in addition to the darkening of the room. However, Hulu, Disney+, ESPN, Paramount do not work anymore in addition to Netflix. This could be due to an update ? Only downside is very limited video streaming. Basically YouTube works or trial and error with a lesser known streaming services.

developer_response.body:
Hi~ @shogunmn, thanks for your feedback! Paramount used to work... it seems that it's a drm issue that prevents us from streaming it. We'll work on this issue and hope to get it supported in the future.
If you have further questions or feedback, please join our Discord page at https://discord.gg/MynsTjZ6Bp.

reviews.review_description: To start off, the main selling point of this app for me was that it marketed it could add Hulu to be watched natively on the quest 3. Much like in the native browser Hulu does not work in the app either! Secondly, the streaming services you can “select” from just take you to the browser website. This app is nothing but a glorified web browser you have to pay for if anything. And last but not least, the spatial lighting would not work for me no matter how many times I tried! What an over rated POS!

developer_response.body: Hi~ @Pluggeinpaul, thanks for your feedback, and I'm so sorry to cause you inconvenience. Could you please provide us with more details about your issue? It may help us to pinpoint it. Please join our Discord:https://discord.gg/MynsTjZ6Bp.

reviews.review_description:
So I bought the app knowing Netflix wasn't supported but I don't understand why, yes I know Netflix uses DRM but it can still only be to do with the browser and the developers and not Netflix as you can stream on the Meta browser. Meta also has issues with its browser so although that does support Netflix it doesn't support ITVX which spatial TV does.

 Seems these developers can't 
 get their act together in providing full compatibility so you need to purchase additional programmes/apps....some may say this is deliberate. Like the app and the lighting is nice....BUT.

I’ve been using it for streaming Hulu and playing cloud games on Xbox. It does use a bit more power, but it’s totally worth it. Netflix isn’t working right now, but everything else runs smoothly. This is an awesome feature, and I hope they keep improving it with future updates.

This app has quickly become my go-to for everything on Quest! It’s so well-designed and really enhances my experience. Whether it’s for entertainment, gaming, or just exploring, it’s now a part of my daily routine. Can’t imagine using my Quest without it!

reviews.review_title: It’s just a web browser but works worse
reviews.review_description: Nothing special about this “app” at all, it’s just a browser but Hulu wouldn’t even load. Worthless.

developer_response.body:
Hi~ @platinumtech, Thanks for your feedback, and I'm sorry to cause you inconvenience. We'll look into this issue.
If you have further questions or feedback, please join our Discord page at https://discord.gg/MynsTjZ6Bp.

reviews.review_description: I discovered this app after seeing a review online, and after using it for some time, I’m genuinely impressed. It really lives up to the hype! The lighting effects that sync with the screen are fantastic, especially in low-light settings—they make the experience incredibly immersive. I’m excited to see how this app evolves and can’t wait for future updates to make it even better.

reviews.review_title: Spatial TV: My New Favorite App on Quest
reviews.review_description: Spatial TV has quickly become my favorite app on Quest! It really ticks all the boxes for me—amazing immersive experience, fantastic lighting effects. It meets all my needs and has transformed how I watch TV and movies. Can’t get enough of it!
This is less of a hub for streaming apps, and more of an “immersive” internet browser

developer_response.body: Hi ~ @JupiterMichaels, thanks for your feedback~ we'll keep making Spatial TV better :)

reviews.review_title: Can't add anymore built in apps
reviews.review_description:
I bought this because it showed several built in streaming apps you can use. I added the HBO app to the left side and now I can't add anymore. The + symbol has gone away. 

The lights do look cool though. Just wish I could add more apps.

developer_response.body:
Hi~ @Childo_Slayer, thank you for your feedback! I'm happy to give you a brief guide.🙂 
Clicking the 'plus button' to add some streaming services we prepared for you initially. After that, the 'plus button' will gone, if you want to add more streaming services, you could point your controller to the top of the screen, and a 'searching bar' will pop up, go to the homepage of the service/app, click the 'star button' to add it to your left slide bar.
I hope these introductions will help.

reviews.review_description: I love to use the screen glowing to watch movies, it looks like the lighting is reflecting your room. When I enable both the environment lighting and the screen glowing, it brings me to another level! They are interactable with the screen, much fun with that!

reviews.review_title: Paramount plus will not play videos
reviews.review_description: I bought this app so I could watch paramount plus movies on my headset, but of course, it does not work. Error message 3304 every single time. My headset is up to date, my internet connection is amazingly fast. I am not using a VPN. I live in Texas. All of the things listing what's causing the errors is not an actual issue I am having, it just refuses to work. I've spent 2 hours trying to find loopholes and get it to work. Please remove the paramount plus feature, because this is straight up false advertising. I would like a refund.

reviews.review_description: Basically, it looks like a browser, but what shocked me was the environment lighting feature, with that enabled, the screen will light up your room like a real screen, also, the screen glowing is the best feature I have ever seen on Meta Quest :)
I never expected that I could watch movies in my room this way. So much fun on this. I hope to see more exciting features in the future!
No option to select or input the text required for logins/passwords to access the streaming apps.

reviews.review_description:
It’s not bad but it’s not friendly user. 
After you select what apps you want access, yo can’t go back to add or subtract anything else. 
Apple TV doesn’t let you log in it only lets you create a new account and when it identifies that you already have an account it doesn’t let you log in. 
Options in the option menu are very simple and not enough.
Maybe it’s me, but it’s not dumb proof. 

Other than that, the screen is amazing and as well as the other reviews I agree the apps and the experience are phenomenal.

reviews.review_description:
I really love this app and would gladly up my rating to 5 stars if the issue with Fandango/Vudu could be fixed. Every so often, after starting a new episode of a show, or even resuming, it will spin for ages and not start playing. Sometimes, a play button will appear in the bottom left corner and clicking that will start it. Other times, most of the time for me lately, the latter is the case. Closing the media with the X in the top left and restarting either does the same, or times out with the error “Please Enable Auto Play in browser”. We do t have such a setting however.

At this stage, you are stuck with a play icon in the middle of the Vudu page, which eventually times out with the same error

Somehow, the Spacial TV app seems be caching the last loaded instance of the page, and doesn’t reflect the current play state if you have watched content on another device. 

The site works flawlessly on the Meta V69  browser however.

Please can you look into this?

Love it otherwise, but currently trying to watch a TV show purchased via Fandango/Vudu in this app, as it is so much better than the browser for 2D content.

Adding support for 3D content like the Meta browser would be a huge bonus, and pretty much allow me to use Spacial TV for everything.

developer_response.body:
Hi, ~ AlanBell68, thank you for your feedback, and I'm sorry for the inconvenience. We will look into this issue.

If you have further questions or feedback, please join our discord at https://discord.gg/MynsTjZ6Bp.

reviews.review_description: When the app opens I’m just getting a Google browser.

developer_response.body:
Hi~@LSUFAN861, I'm sorry to cause you inconvenience.
It's my pleasure to give you a brief guide.

-If you want to get streaming services
You can point your controller to the left of the screen, and a 'plus button' will pop up, click the 'plus button' to add some streaming services we prepared for you initially. After that, the 'plus button' will gone, if you want to add more streaming services, you could point your controller to the top of the screen, and a 'searching bar' will pop up, go to the homepage of the service/app, click the 'star button' to add it to your left slide bar.

-If you want to move or scale the screen
You can point your controller to the bottom or bottom right of the screen, and hold the button to move or scale the screen.

-For more lighting settings
You can point your controller to the right of the screen, use the slider to adjust the Passthrough brightness, and use the setting button above it to open the environment lighting or screen glowing.

I hope these introductions will help. 

If you have further questions or feedback, please join our discord at https://discord.gg/MynsTjZ6Bp.
